title: Operations Manager (Retail) | Orchard | 5 days | up $4.5K per month
description:
Location: Orchard
Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Monday to Friday)

About the Role

Our client is seeking a highly driven and resilient Operations Manager to oversee day-to-day operations and support the continued growth of a world-class luxury brand. This role is ideal for someone who thrives under pressure, remains optimistic in fast-paced environments, and enjoys building structure, efficiency, and strong working relationships across teams and partners.

You will play a key role in ensuring operational excellence, administrative efficiency, and seamless coordination across business functions while supporting senior leadership.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide leadership and operational oversight to ensure effective controls, systems, and reporting procedures are in place.

  • Establish operational plans, budgets, performance measurements, and resource allocation; review progress and outcomes regularly.

  • Coordinate with landlords, vendors, and contractors on all operational matters.

  • Oversee warehouse and inventory management, including import/export logistics to maximise efficiency and accuracy.

  • Liaise with IT vendors to coordinate system maintenance and software updates.

  • Ensure all repairs and maintenance works meet required standards and remain within budget.

  • Research and implement strategies to support manpower planning and resourcing needs.

  • Lead and manage Office Administration and Service Administration teams.

  • Build and maintain effective working relationships across internal teams and stakeholders.

  • Manage daily agendas, calendars, and schedules; coordinate meetings and travel arrangements for the General Manager.

  • Handle travel logistics including flight bookings, hotel accommodation, and visa applications.

  • Perform any other duties assigned by the General Manager of Steinway Gallery.

Requirements

  • Diploma / Degree in a relevant field with at least 3 years of working experience.

  • Highly independent, responsible, and resourceful.

  • Flexible, resilient, and able to work well under pressure.

  • IT-savvy with good proficiency in Microsoft Office.

  • Basic accounting knowledge is an advantage.

  • As this is a music consumer industry - applicant who has appreciation for music is a plus, but not mandatory.

Apply now if you are a proactive operations professional who enjoys challenge, structure, and excellence.

Send your updated CV to deborah@crew.sg with - Your expected salary, last drawn package, notice period / earliest start date

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Ho Yu Qing Deborah (R1104551)
